statement: In every magma, Equation 3110 (`x = (((y * x) * x) * z) * z`) implies Equation 4441 (`x * (y * x) = (x * z) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0126
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y x) x) z) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x (op y x)) = (op (op x z) w)
